Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Jonas Correia v. Luis Diogo

Video.summary: Nick ""The Promise"" Ring has been training and competing in Martial Arts for 20 years. He reflects on his UFC career, martial arts, love of books and what's it like to be a father.

Image.alt: Day in the Life of a Fighter - Nick Ring
Day in the Life of a Fighter - Nick Ring
Day in the Life of a Fighter - Nick Ring

Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Joshua Quayhagen vs. Muslum Basturk
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Joshua Quayhagen vs. Muslum Basturk

Video.summary: Out of the Cage reveals the private thoughts and emotions of an MMA fighter, the ambition that drives them and how they are affected when encountering defeat or facing triumph. Featuring Tom Theocharis at HK50

Video.title: Out of the Cage - Tom Theocharis

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Tom Theocharis
Out of the Cage - Tom Theocharis

Video.summary: Todd Johnston was a well known competitor in Martial Arts, and has since devoted his time to helping other aspiring fighters achieve their goals. Under Todd's tutelage, several Hard Knocks fighters have gone above and beyond what they set out to accomplish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Day in the Life of a Coach - Todd Johnston
Video.title: Day in the Life of a Coach - Todd Johnston

Image.alt: Day in the Life of a Coach - Todd Johnston

WCMMA 21 - Mindaugas Mikaliak v. Adrian Kubiak
WCMMA 21 - Mindaugas Mikaliak v. Adrian Kubiak

Video.summary: Hard Knocks 43 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features the amateur matchup of debut Kyle Messenger vs. Patrick 'Cyborg' Leblanc. Also in his amateur debut, Nick Felber faces Tyler Kobayashi. The pro card begins with Trenton Rowell vs. former Light Heavyweight and Heavyweight Amateur Champion, Devon ""Mr. Boomtruck"" Smith. Capping this show is an exciting Light Heavyweight Title Fight between Misha Cirkunov defending his title against challenger Shaun Asher. You do not want to miss it!
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK43 - Episode 3
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK43 - Episode 3

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK43 - Episode 3
Fight Vault - HK43 - Episode 3
Fight Vault - HK43 - Episode 3

Video.summary: The excitement never ends at Hard Knocks 43! Watch top Wrestler Justin Basra battle it out against Jason Fournier. Ryan Connor faces Owen Carr from Team Alpha Male in this exciting match displaying high level Jiu Jitsu skills.
Video.grandparentTitle: Fight Vault - HK43 - Episode 4
Video.title: Fight Vault - HK43 - Episode 4

Image.alt: Fight Vault - HK43 - Episode 4

Video.summary: MMA Veteran Nick Thompson goes up against the brute force of wrestling star Davion Peterson. Thompson has more pro fight experience than anyone on the first series, and will need all of it to hold his own against the relentless Peterson.

Video.title: Bodog Fight - Episode 5

Finish of the Day - Chris Chapman - HKFC

Video.summary: The big dogs go at it, as heavyweight Mario “The Big Hurt” Rinaldi puts his stellar record on the line against the hard-working, hard-fighting and hard-living Mark Burch. Rinaldi has never lost, and Burch has been defeated just one, so neither man will give an inch.
Video.grandparentTitle: Bodog Fight - Episode 6
Video.title: Bodog Fight - Episode 6

Video.summary: The School of Hard Knocks 22 filmed at the Century Casino in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Andrew Shenfield vs. BJ Baldonado; Beau Bentley vs. Daymon Miller; David Cloutier vs. Gurdip Rangi.

Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Milos Vukovic v. Igor De Castaneda.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: HOLLYWOOD - Milos Vukovic v. Igor De Castaneda

Video.summary: Mike Hernandez is here to take the Bantamweight title away from Jesse Arnett. Coming off of a 6 win streak, he is in the Hard Knocks cage for nothing else but the belt!
